name: Stacy
trait: Canı 15%-in altına düşdükdə menzili +10% artar. Atışları ekstra 4x8 Hasar verər
story: Losing her parents at a young age, Stacy was raised by Ase. To survive in this harsh underground world, she threw herself into the flames and learned to master fire. The desire to fly never left her. She built a powerful jetpack device out of scraps. Now, this young girl with glasses and ginger hair soars through the darkness of the underground caves, spreading flames and becoming the bravest scout of the Constructs team.

name: Death
trait: Ölən hər kart üçün +2 Hasar bonusu qazanar. (Max: 80)
story: Death, the ultimate interdimensional horror of the Void Walkers, standing in a dark cosmic arena shrouded by an overwhelming sea of dense black mist. The figure appears as a dead, ancient entity wrapped in long, tattered pitch-black robes that blend into the surrounding darkness. Its body is partially hidden, with only fragments of a skeletal, lifeless form visible through the fog. Death's presence radiates absolute dread, as if reality itself is decaying around it. In its hands, Death holds a mysterious dark-black orb, an ancient cosmic artifact glowing with sinister void energy. The orb emits faint streams of shadow and absorbs surrounding light, creating a gravitational feeling of despair and extinction. Wisps of stolen life energy spiral into the orb from the darkness, suggesting countless souls consumed by its power. The environment is almost entirely concealed by thick supernatural mist. The fog is so dense that most of Death's body remains obscured, revealing only vague silhouettes and glimpses of its terrifying form. Shadows twist within the mist, making it impossible to determine where the creature truly begins or ends. The atmosphere is oppressive, eerie, and apocalyptic.

name: Sylviana
trait: Öləndə içindən *Butterflies* çıxar, *Uzaylı* tipli kartlardan -20% daha az hasar alar.
story: The Luminous Elf, a breathtakingly beautiful high elf from a hidden botanical realm untouched by time and corruption. She embodies the pure essence of nature itself, radiating serenity, life, and sacred beauty. Her elegant appearance reflects her deep connection to flowers, forests, and the natural world. Sylviana has long, flowing hair with a luminous, ethereal quality, cascading gracefully around her shoulders and back. Her delicate elven features, pointed ears, and graceful posture give her an otherworldly presence. Her eyes glow softly with the energy of nature, appearing like living emeralds infused with ancient wisdom and compassion. She wears an exquisite nature-inspired outfit resembling a blend of elven nobility and sacred botanical priestess attire. Flowing fabrics, intricate leaf patterns, floral embroidery, and elegant organic designs are woven throughout her clothing. The outfit feels refined, magical, and deeply connected to the natural world, with no harsh or mechanical elements. Countless vibrant flowers bloom around her presence, creating a living garden wherever she stands. Delicate butterflies of various colors gently flutter around her, drawn to her radiant life energy. Flower petals drift through the air alongside glowing particles of natural magic, creating a peaceful yet powerful atmosphere. A soft, luminous aura constantly emanates from her body, illuminating the surrounding darkness with warm, natural light. The glow is neither harsh nor artificial; instead, it resembles sunlight filtered through ancient forest canopies. The light highlights nearby flowers, butterflies, and vegetation while pushing back the shadows around her. Behind Sylviana stretches a mystical botanical sanctuary hidden within a magical realm. Towering ancient trees, luminous flowers, enchanted vines, crystal-clear streams, and glowing plants create a breathtaking environment. The landscape feels sacred and untouched, as though nature itself is alive and protecting its guardian. The overall atmosphere should feel majestic, magical, and serene. Sylviana appears as a living embodiment of hope, beauty, and nature's resilience against darkness.

name: Malvaris
trait: Malvaris zərbə vurduğu hər bir rəqib kartı 2 saniyəlik xüsusi bir ruh damğası ilə işarələyər. Bu işarəni daşıyan rəqib kartlar hər hansı bir səbəbdən öldükdə, onların ruhları dərhal qaranlıq tərəfə keçərək bir "Phantomis"-ə çevrilər. O, döyüş meydanında fədakarlığı mükafatlandırır; ölən hər bir dost kart Malvaris-in qəzəbini alovlandıraraq onun kritik şans göstəricisini +0,5% artırar. Bu kritik şans bonusu maksimum 75%-ə qədər yüksələ bilər.
story: Malvaris is an undead monster with a deceptive human-like form. This medium-sized creature strikes with lethal precision, wielding twin daggers in both hands. Like his King, he wears dark purple and black garments that blend into the shadows of the deep. He is a swift assassin who moves in silence, seeking the gaps in enemy armor. His gaze is cold and hollow, focused only on the kill. Within the UnderWorld, he serves as the unseen blade that removes obstacles before they even notice his presence.

forms.name: Phantomis
forms.trait: Bu döyüşçülər birgə hərəkət etdikdə qat-qat güclənən kütləvi bir mexanikaya malikdir. Döyüş meydanında mövcud olan hər bir əlavə Phantomis üçün ordudakı bütün Phantomis-lər +10% hasar və +5% hücum sürəti qazanar. Onların sayı artdıqca meydandakı effektivlikləri həndəsi silsilə ilə çoxalar.

name: Etheris
trait: Qalxan alınan hasarın 30%-ni rəqibə ötürər

name: Magma
trait: -5 Can hər saniyə, arxasındakı kartlar ekstra 2x5 Yanma Hasarı verər

name: Avalith
trait: 33% Şansa hasar almaz, menzilə görə Saldırı Hızı, Gecikmə Vaxtı 80%-ə qədər azalar

name: Far
trait: 13% Şansla rəqibləri 2 saniyəlik sərsəmlətər

name: Demotron
trait: Demotron döyüş meydanında zərər gördükcə daxili strukturu avtomatik olaraq bərpa olunmağa başlayar. O, hər 10 saniyədə bir itirdiyi ümumi can miqdarının 10%-i qədərini dərhal bərpa edər. Bu xüsusiyyət sayəsində o, nə qədər çox hasar alsa, bir o qədər yüksək bərpa effekti nümayiş etdirərək döyüşdə qalma müddətini uzadar.
story: Demotron is an ancient titan made of living stone and obsidian, powered by a dying sun’s core. It is the architect of the Ancients' fortresses, a massive construct that serves as a mobile siege engine. Every step it takes shakes the foundation of the earth, and its eyes emit beams of pure, concentrated energy. Demotron is slow, but its durability is unmatched. It is a relic of a time when giants ruled the world, and it has returned to crush the tiny kingdoms of the modern era.

name: Format
trait: 15,000 Karo qabaqdakı ən güclü rəqibə dönüşər (3 saniyə ərzində)

name: Pyhsic
trait: Hər 34 saniyədə 5,000 Karo qarşıdakı rəqibi yox edər

name: Naar
trait: Naar-ın canı 40%-in altına düşdükdə hiddətlənərək ətrafına 10 saniyə boyunca 20 ədəd nar atar. Bu narlar hər biri 4 hasar verər. Bu hücum nəticəsində ölən rəqib kartlar partlayaraq yaxınlıqdakı digər düşmənlərə 40 hasar verər.
story: Naar is a botanical sorcerer with a peculiar obsession: the pomegranate. He finds beauty and lethal potential in nature, using magically enhanced fruits as his primary weapons. He can command vines to entangle foes or launch explosive pomegranate seeds that shatter on impact. For Naar, the garden is a battlefield, and every plant is a soldier waiting for his command. His neutral stance stems from his loyalty to the earth, caring more for the health of his grove than the politics of men.

name: Lyra
trait: Hər 3-cü vuruşu ekstra 2 dəfə təkrarlanar (3x6)

name: Aeralis
trait: Aeralis etdiyi hər bir uzaq məsafəli atışla hədəf aldığı rəqibləri 0,1 karo geri itələyər. O, yüksək konsentrasiya sayəsində 12% şansla bu effekti gücləndirərək rəqibi normal məsafədən 4 dəfə daha çox, yəni birbaşa 0,4 karo geri fırladar. Bu mexanika yaxın məsafəli döyüşçüləri uzaqda saxlamaq üçün əvəzsizdir.
story: Aeralis chose the path of magic over science since his early childhood, mastering the invisible currents of the world. His power to bend the air is so immense that no creature can withstand his gales. However, this divine strength is a double-edged sword; controlling the violent winds requires his absolute focus and spiritual discipline. On the battlefield, he is a storm in human form, clearing entire paths for the Royal Blood with a single wave of his hand.

name: Dark Necromancer
trait: Dark Necromancer-in etdiyi uzaq məsafəli atışlar qaranlıq enerji daşıyır və hədəf aldığı rəqib kartları 17% şansla 10 saniyəlik susturar. Ölülər dünyası ilə birbaşa əlaqəsi olan bu sehrbaz, döyüş meydanında tək qalmır. O, hər 14 saniyədə bir kölgələrdən yeni bir döyüşçü vahid yaradar. Çağırılan kartların şans göstəriciləri aşağıdakı kimidir:Bladeknight: 40%,Stormbow: 35%,Ironhide: 25%
story: Once a powerful mage, the Dark Necromancer was cursed for practicing forbidden arts. Now a restless spirit, he channels his corruption to summon the fallen. He brings forth three spectral entities: the Warrior, the Archer, and the Tank. These summons are the ghosts of former royalty, bound to his will by dark magic. He does not fight directly; instead, he manipulates the battlefield from the rear. His existence is a haunting reminder that even the most noble souls can be enslaved by darkness.

forms.name: Bladeknight
forms.trait: Bu qaranlıq cəngavərin qılıncı mistik bir enerji ilə yüklənib. Onun etdiyi bütün zərbələr rəqib kartların aktiv qalxanlarını tamamilə görməzdən gələrək birbaşa onların canına hasar vurar. Qalxan arxasında gizlənən tankları sıradan çıxarmaq üçün idealdır.

forms.name: Stormbow
forms.trait: Kölgə oxçusu hər atışında rəqib xətlərini atəşə tutmağa çalışır. O, 35% şansla hədəfə doğru alovlu ox ataraq düşmən kartı yandırar və zamanla ona əlavə 2x4 hasar verər.

forms.name: Ironhide
forms.trait: Qrupun ən ağır və dözümlü qoruyucusu olan Ironhide, bədənini bürüyən qaranlıq zireh sayəsində rəqibdən gələn hər 4-cü hasarı tamamilə görməzdən gələr. Ön xətdə vaxt qazanmaq və hücumları sormaq üçün mükəmməl bir sipərdir.

name: Shine
trait: Ətrafındakı kartlara hər saniyə +1 M.Can verər (Max:50)

name: Bloodraider
trait: Hər hasar verdikcə M.Canının 4%-ni itirər və hasarı +10% artar
story: Bloodraider, a cursed dark fantasy warrior driven by a self-destructive oath, standing in a battlefield engulfed by shadows and crimson energy. Its body appears damaged and exhausted, yet fueled by relentless determination. Streams of glowing red life essence flow from its head and body, creating the impression that its own vitality is constantly escaping while sustaining its power. Unlike a traditional executioner weapon, the Blood Reaper is a relatively small but extremely deadly scythe forged entirely from condensed crimson life energy. The blade is sharp, curved, and made of swirling red energy that resembles liquid crystal. Heavy dark chains are permanently attached and wrapped around the scythe's handle, linking the weapon directly to Bloodraider. The chains appear ancient, worn, and partially infused with the same crimson energy as the weapon. Bloodraider firmly holds the smaller Blood Reaper in one hand, while its other hand grips a long length of chain extending from the weapon. The chains hang, coil, and sway around the character, creating a menacing silhouette and emphasizing the bond between wielder and weapon. Crimson energy continuously flows through the chains like glowing veins. Red life essence leaks from cracks in its armor, from its head, arms, and chest, drifting through the air as luminous particles and flowing streams. The surrounding atmosphere is filled with dark mist, floating crimson embers, and traces of supernatural energy. The character radiates sacrifice, destruction, and unwavering aggression. Ultra-realistic dark fantasy character design, photorealistic materials, highly detailed chains, realistic metal textures, cinematic lighting, volumetric fog, realistic cloth physics, glowing crimson energy effects, intimidating stance, dark atmosphere, AAA game card art, Unreal Engine 5, physically based rendering, hyper-detailed textures, masterpiece quality, 8K, dramatic shadows, realistic anatomy, epic fantasy illustration.

name: Fallen Angel
trait: Fallen Angel döyüşə başladığı an önündəki 7,500 karo məsafədə yerləşən və canı ən yüksək olan rəqib kartı özünə əsas hədəf seçər. Bu seçilmiş hədəfə vurduğu hər bir uğurlu zərbə ona +1% hücum sürəti qazandırar.Bu sürət bonusu maksimum 80%-ə qədər yüksələ bilər. Təyin olunan hədəf dəyişənə və ya məhv edilənə qədər Fallen Angel getdikcə daha sürətli və amansız hücumlar edər.
story: Fallen Angel was once a high-ranking member of the Royal Blood's ancestors, but she was cast out for seeking the forbidden power of the Ancients. Her wings are now tattered and stained with shadow, and her golden armor has turned to a rusted, cursed bronze. She retains her celestial grace but uses it to deliver merciless destruction. She despises the current Royal Blood line and leads the Ancients with a cold, calculated vengeance, seeking to reclaim the throne that she believes is rightfully hers.

name: Worms
trait: Worms döyüş meydanında hərəkət edərkən yerin altında gizlənir. İlk vuruşunu etmək üçün qəfildən yerin altından çıxar və bu gözlənilməz hücum hədəf aldığı rəqib kartları 0,8 saniyəlik sarsıdar. Düşmən müdafiəsini iflic etmək üçün mükəmməl bir başlanğıc kartıdır.
story: These are not the harmless creatures found in common soil. Henry’s bio-engineering transformed these tiny worms into aggressive, flesh-eating scavengers. They move in writhing masses, hidden beneath the earth until they detect a vibration. Once they emerge, their hunger is insatiable. They are the farm's underground security, small enough to bypass most defenses but fierce enough to tear through leather and bone. For Henry, they are the perfect disposal system for his failed experiments.

name: Unara
trait: Unara hər uğurlu zərbəsində 9 yük toplayar. 100 yükə çatdıqda ultisi aktivləşər: Ətrafındakı rəqibləri 2 karo geriyə itələyərərək və onlara ardıcıl olaraq 30 ədəd sehrli orb atar, hər bir orb 2 hasar verər. (Hücum sürəti: 0,1).
story: Unara is the mother of Laura, but she possesses a much darker and more guarded nature. Unlike her daughter, she trusts no one and uses her magic strictly for self-preservation. She surrounds herself with impenetrable arcane barriers, keeping the world at a distance to ensure her own safety. Her neutral outlook is driven by survival; she will neither help nor hinder others unless they threaten her solitude. She is a solitary fortress of magic, cold and unyielding to those who seek her aid.

name: Ali
trait: Yaxında dost kart varsa hər bir kart üçün hər saniyə 4 yük qazanar. 100 yük olduqda özü və ətrafındakı dost kartlar 3 saniyəlik toxunulmaz olar

name: Clara
trait: Yaxındakı hər bir rəqib üçün hər saniyə 20 yük qazanar. 100 yükə çatdıqda ətrafındakı rəqib kartları 7 saniyəlik qışqırdar və hər 0.25 saniyədə 3 can yeniləyər
story: The Auburn Artist, the 27-year-old eldest sibling of the Barber Brothers, a graceful and highly respected master stylist known for her elegance, creativity, and flawless technique. While her brothers rely on speed and precision, Clara excels through artistry, transforming every hairstyle into a masterpiece. She serves as the calm and sophisticated center of the family business, balancing the energetic personalities of Fen and Ben. Clara is a beautiful young woman with long, luxurious auburn hair that cascades elegantly around her shoulders. Her hair is impeccably styled, featuring intricate braids, flowing layers, and refined details that showcase her extraordinary talent. Her warm, intelligent eyes and composed expression radiate confidence, professionalism, and creativity. She wears a sophisticated stylist outfit that blends modern salon fashion with elegant fantasy aesthetics. Her attire includes tailored fabrics, refined accessories, stylish gloves, decorative ribbons, and subtle beauty-inspired motifs. The outfit feels professional, fashionable, and artistic rather than combat-oriented, emphasizing her role as a master designer and creator. In her hands are beautifully crafted professional styling scissors, combs, and hairstyling tools, all designed with exceptional elegance. Around her float strands of shimmering hair-like energy, decorative ribbons, and graceful swirling patterns that resemble intricate hairstyle designs brought to life. The visual effects should feel artistic and refined rather than aggressive. Her pose is calm and deliberate, as though she is carefully crafting a masterpiece. Delicate streams of flowing auburn-colored energy weave through the air around her, forming elegant curves and patterns inspired by sophisticated hairstyles. Every movement reflects precision, beauty, and years of experience. The environment combines a luxurious high-end salon with a fantasy-inspired creative studio. Elegant mirrors, premium styling stations, decorative lighting, floral arrangements, and artistic design elements surround her. The atmosphere feels welcoming, refined, and professional while still carrying the grandeur of a fantasy card illustration. The overall composition should emphasize beauty, artistry, elegance, and mastery. Clara appears not as a warrior, but as an elite stylist whose creativity has become a powerful force. She embodies sophistication, professionalism, and the flawless reputation of the Barber Brothers.

name: Artist
trait: Rəqib kartlara mürəkkəb atar və bu mürəkkəblər rəqib kartın üstündə qalar. Hər bir mürəkkəb rəqib kartı 2% yavaşladar, 18 mürəkkəb bulaşdırdıqdan sonra rəqib kartı lənətləyər. Lənətlənən kart öldükdə ətrafa 3 mürəkkəb bulaşdırar. Lənətlənən hər bir kart başına Artist 25 yük qazanar. Artist öldükdə Quzğun sürüsünə dönüşər. Hər 25 yük Quzğun sürüsünü +2 artırar.
story: The Ink Reborn, a young underground painter from The Last Academy, an alternate dystopian world where every form of art, creativity, painting, sculpture, music, and expression has been outlawed by an oppressive regime. Once celebrated in secret as a legendary street artist, Alice became the symbol of silent rebellion, covering abandoned buildings with magnificent murals of ravens—a powerful metaphor representing death, freedom, and the inevitable fall of tyranny. Alice is a striking young woman with slightly messy jet-black hair streaked with subtle ink-blue highlights. Her face is calm yet determined, carrying the quiet resilience of someone who has survived unimaginable loss. Traces of black ink lightly stain her cheeks and clothing, giving her the appearance of a living masterpiece. Instead of ordinary hands, both of her forearms dissolve into living spectral ink. The ink continuously flows, twists, and reforms into elegant human hands made entirely of liquid darkness. The fingers constantly drip and reconstruct themselves, yet remain perfectly controlled, as though the ink possesses a consciousness connected directly to Alice's emotions. Small droplets float upward instead of falling, defying gravity. Around her, countless floating black ravens made entirely of liquid ink emerge from swirling brush strokes and splashes suspended in the air. Some ravens are fully formed while others dissolve into elegant calligraphic strokes and abstract shapes before reforming again. The birds circle her like loyal spirits born from forbidden creativity. Behind Alice stretches a haunting fusion of a dystopian city and the mysterious UnderWorld. Towering concrete structures covered in faded propaganda merge into impossible architecture made of black stone and endless darkness. Gigantic murals appear across broken walls, depicting ravens, shattered chains, abstract brush strokes, and symbols of artistic rebellion. Rivers of flowing ink replace water, reflecting dim light like liquid obsidian. Spectral ink ribbons spiral around her body, transforming into paint splashes, brush strokes, feathers, and elegant artistic patterns before dissolving back into darkness. The atmosphere feels melancholic yet inspiring—a world where forbidden creativity has become supernatural power. Her clothing combines modern street artist fashion with gothic elegance: a long black coat covered in paint stains, layered fabrics, utility straps for brushes she no longer physically needs, and subtle artistic motifs inspired by ink splatters and calligraphy. The design emphasizes resilience, rebellion, and creativity rather than combat. She stands confidently in front of a massive unfinished mural, her living ink hands actively painting impossible shapes directly into reality itself. Every movement leaves behind elegant black strokes that float in midair like living artwork.

forms.name: Flock of Ravens
forms.story: 7 saniyəlik ömrü olar, hər öldürülən rəqib kart üçün +2 saniyə daha yaşayarlar.
